ddt:Target.Name: DC4_Mam2_XFB_XFD_XFE_XFF_XJD_X79Ph2_X87Ph2_v2.5
ddt:Target.Description:
GETRAG Dual Clutch Transmission Applications: DC4: xFB, xFD, xFE, xFF, xJD, X87ph2, x79ph2 Author: DCMAP-RTR / UET TA API: ROCTTT09 ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Reference document: DCT250_CMF_DED_DFS_v1.0.2.pdf -----------------------------------------------------------------------
v1.0 - Database creation v1.1 - Data correction, request creation, screens update, DID corrections v1.2 - Reorganized screens Request $3B2C02010000 corrected: deleted data from sent Request $3B2C02020000 corrected: deleted data from sent "Engine status" data corrected: value 10 modified to 2 and value 11 modified to 3 "MEX status" data corrected: value 10 modified to 2 and 111 value modified to 7 Added "hw_ff_buffer_12" DID with hw_ff_buffer_12.vsens_u_kl30_low_power_filtered hw_ff_buffer_12.vtemp_temp_ambient hw_ff_buffer_12.os_reset_timer_100ms hw_ff_buffer_12.vsens_freq_oss hw_ff_buffer_12.vatic107_err_status[3] hw_ff_buffer_12.vsens_u_kl30_high_power_filtered hw_ff_buffer_12.vsens_i_shift2_maximum hw_ff_buffer_12.vsens_i_shift2_average hw_ff_buffer_12.vbldcams_local_err_stt[1] datas Modified "Gearbox engaged gears 1" DID size from 2 to 1 and "Gearbox engaged gears 1" data from 16 to 8 Modified "Gearbox engaged gears 2" DID size from 2 to 1 and "Gearbox engaged gears 2" data from 16 to 8 Added unit to "Voltage signal for permanent low" data Modified "Error of shift lever evaluation" Added "Error of shift lever evaluation.TRS 1 low voltage" Added "Error of shift lever evaluation.TRS 1 high voltage" Added "Error of shift lever evaluation.TRS 1" Added "Error of shift lever evaluation.TRS 0 low voltage" Added "Error of shift lever evaluation.TRS 0 high voltage" Added "Error of shift lever evaluation.TRS 0" Added "Error of shift lever evaluation.Shifter" Added "Error of shift lever evaluation.All different" Added FailureType 12 to "ATIC: clutch actuator 1" $1743 Added FailureType 12 to "ATIC: clutch actuator 2" $1744 Modified data "Buffer.16bit.1b.gbm_gear_if0" Modified data "Buffer.16bit.1b.gbm_gear_if1" "ApprovalNumber.BasicPartList" for 0 changed to N/A "PartNumber.BasicPartList" for 0 changed to N/A "Read estimated engine torque offset" modified from 32 to 16 bits Reorganized & updated screens Modified shift gears to N 313E010000000000000000 Renamed DID's and corresponding data v2.1 - Update database New requests added: $21$A9 --> Roller bench state $3B$A9 --> Modify roller bench state $21$2A --> Format update to 16 bytes $21$2B --> Removed request $3B$2A--> Format update to 16 bytes $3B$2B--> Removed request $31$07 --> Updated request $30$64 --> New request $30$65 --> New request $30$66 --> New request $31$06 --> Format update Updated existing screens with additonal information Screens now correctly show $22 DIDs, no more blocking TCU,missing data Added bench mode screen Added new SW versions and new branch for x79Ph2 Corrected buffer type for several data specific to FF DIDs Added Shift lever check screen Added TRS check screen Added clutch motor screen Added ISS check screen Added development screen
V2.2 update Removed traceability screen $2184, because it is not used by the supplier. There was an agrement in the past (2009) that the sticker placed on the TCU is enough. Shift lever test procedure screen updated with table of values Check TRS screen updated with the correct values provided by the supplier Corrected request format for service $32 Added Shiftdrum positions screen Added measuring unit second for data: vbi_tim_absolute_if Added clutch torque capacity recovery
v2.5 update Added Auto identification for 3204 110 (Vdiag$04)

Data.Name: Counter for rev gear engagement errors
Mileage counter since last LH occured
Driving cycle counter since last LH occured
max value of clutch 1 energy for a single event
max value of clutch 2 energy for a single event
statistic logging for the maximum input shaft speed 1
statistic logging for the maximum input shaft speed 2
maximum actuator position for clutch 1 touch point
maximum actuator position for clutch 2 touch point
minimum actuator position for clutch 1 touch point
minimum actuator position for clutch 2 touch point
Min value of l2 counter Sz001
Min value of l2 counter Sz002
Min value of l2 counter Sz003
Min value of l2 counter Sz004
Min value of l2 counter Sz006a
Min value of l2 counter Sz006b
Min value of l2 counter Sz007
Min value of l2 counter Sz008
Avg value of l2 counter Sz001
Avg value of l2 counter Sz002
Avg value of l2 counter Sz003
Avg value of l2 counter Sz004
Avg value of l2 counter Sz006a
Avg value of l2 counter Sz006b
Avg value of l2 counter Sz007
Avg value of l2 counter Sz008
Engine RPM
Data.Comment: Engine speed received on the CAN from ECM

Data.Name: Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Item.Text: Routine Aborted due to an error

Data.Name: Input shaft speed 1
Data.Comment: input shaft speeds - signed, checked, filtered, odd / even path

Data.Name: Input shaft speed 2
Data.Comment: input shaft speeds - signed, checked, filtered, odd / even path

Data.Name: Engine speed
Data.Comment: engine speed at flywheel (preprocessed) - filtered, plausibility and ranged checked

Data.Name: Gradient of input shaft speed 1
Data.Comment: gradient of input shaft speed - derived from input shaft speed - filtered

Data.Name: Gradient of input shaft speed 2
Data.Comment: gradient of input shaft speed - derived from input shaft speed - filtered

Data.Name: Static engine torque
Data.Comment: Signal from CAN: static engine torque

Data.Name: State of clutch 1 temperature
Data.Comment: state showing the state of the clutch temperature

Data.Name: State of clutch 2 temperature
Data.Comment: state showing the state of the clutch temperature

Data.Name: Factors for clutch 1 temperature states red
Data.Comment: factors for clutch temperature states red

Data.Name: Factors for clutch 2 temperature states red
Data.Comment: factors for clutch temperature states red

Data.Name: Clutch 1 electric motor output
Data.Comment: clutch 1 output stages mode - Operation mode requested for the clutch 1 electric motor output stages

Data.Name: Clutch 2 electric motor output
Data.Comment: clutch 2 output stages mode - Operation mode requested for the clutch 2 electric motor output stages

Data.Name: PWM value from TRS sensor
Data.Comment: PWM value from TRS sensor - raw TRS sensor angle

Data.Name: Voltage signal for permanent low
Data.Comment: Voltage signal for permanent low - power supply

Data.Name: Gearbox engaged gears 1
Data.Comment: gears of both gearbox parts - shows engaged gears

Data.Name: Gearbox engaged gears 2
Data.Comment: gears of both gearbox parts - shows engaged gears

Data.Name: Clucth energy of active transmission 1
Data.Comment: clutch energy of active transmission part for current driving situation

Data.Name: Clucth energy of active transmission 2
Data.Comment: clutch energy of active transmission part for current driving situation

Data.Name: System wide time
Data.Comment: system wide time counter in milliseconds

Data.Name: Self open clutch 1 error
Data.Comment: Error flag shown when it is detected that the clutch system is not self opening

Data.Name: Self open clutch 2 error
Data.Comment: Error flag shown when it is detected that the clutch system is not self opening

Data.Name: Acceleration pedal value level 2
Data.Comment: acceleration pedal value level 2 from the time before reset

Data.Name: Shift lever position value level 2
Data.Comment: shift lever position value level 2 from the time before reset

Data.Name: Bitcoded engaged gears level 2
Data.Comment: engaged gears level 2 from the time before reset

Data.Name: Clutch 1 torque value level 2
Data.Comment: clutch 1 torque value level 2 from the time before reset

Data.Name: Cutch 2 torque value level 2
Data.Comment: clutch 2 torque value level 2 from the time before reset

Data.Name: Engine torque request value level 2
Data.Comment: engine torque request value level 2 from the time before reset

Data.Name: Maximum allowed engine torque
Data.Comment: maximum allowed engine torque including torque limitation by transmission

Data.Name: Accelerator pedal
Data.Comment: Signal from CAN: accelerator pedal (ergonomic curve)

Data.Name: TRS sensor 1 input signal error state
Data.Comment: error state of TRS sensor input signal

Data.Name: TRS sensor 2 input signal error state
Data.Comment: error state of TRS sensor input signal

Data.Name: Estimated clutch 1 torque
Data.Comment: estimated clutch torque from the time before reset

Data.Name: Estimated clutch 2 torque
Data.Comment: estimated clutch torque from the time before reset

Data.Name: Buffer.Drum.State.Substate.State from the time before reset
Data.Comment: drm_state from the time before reset

Data.Name: Buffer.Drum.State.Substate.Substate from the time before reset
Data.Comment: drmum state from the time before reset

Data.Name: Vehicle rolling direction
Data.Comment: vehicle rolling direction - derived from directional speed sensor of input shaft speed 1

Data.Name: Buffer.16bit.2.Estimated clutch 1 torque
Data.Comment: estimated clutch torque from the time before reset

Data.Name: Buffer.16bit.2.Estimated clutch 2 torque
Data.Comment: estimated clutch torque from the time before reset

Data.Name: fs_16bit_buffer_4.Vehicle rolling direction
Data.Comment: vehicle rolling direction - derived from directional speed sensor of input shaft speed 1

Data.Name: Encoder value of shiftdrum 1 during last
Data.Comment: encoder value of shiftdrum 1 during last shutdown

Data.Name: Encoder value of shiftdrum 2 during last
Data.Comment: encoder value of shiftdrum 2 during last shutdown

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum1.Part2.Tableindex for shift parameters
Data.Comment: tableindex for the access of shift parameters

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum1.Part3.Engine on indicator
Data.Comment: indicates that the engine is running

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum1.Part4.Shiftdrum motor 1 amplifier stage enabled
Data.Comment: amplifier stage of shiftdrum motor enabled

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum1.Part6.Remaining shifts till shutoff amplifier stage
Data.Comment: counter remaining shifts till shutoff of amplifier stage

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum1.Part6.Actual gear of current engage activity
Data.Comment: actual gear of the current engage activity on sd1

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum1.Part6.Target gear sd1
Data.Comment: target gear checked by clutch and gearbox

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum1.Part7.State of shiftdrum 1 logic
Data.Comment: state of the shiftdrum logic for SD1

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum2.Part2.Tableindex for shift parameters
Data.Comment: tableindex for the access of shift parameters

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum2.Part3.Engine on indicator
Data.Comment: indicates that the engine is running

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum2.Part4.Shiftdrum motor 1 amplifier stage enabled
Data.Comment: amplifier stage of shiftdrum motor enabled

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum2.Part6.Remaining shifts till shutoff amplifier stage
Data.Comment: counter remaining shifts till shutoff of amplifier stage

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum2.Part6.Actual gear of current engage activity
Data.Comment: actual gear of the current engage activity on sd2

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum2.Part6.Target gear sd2
Data.Comment: target gear checked by clutch and gearbox

Data.Name: Buffer.Shiftdrum2.Part7.State of shiftdrum 2 logic
Data.Comment: state of the shiftdrum logic for SD2

Data.Name: Buffer.Gti.Part2.Engine on indicator
Data.Comment: indicates that the engine is running

Data.Name: Buffer.Gti.Part3.Amplifier stage Shiftdrum motor 1 enabled
Data.Comment: amplifier stage of shiftdrum motor enabled

Data.Name: Buffer.Gti.Part4.Shiftdrum motor 1 amplifier stage enabled
Data.Comment: amplifier stage of shiftdrum motor enabled

Data.Name: Buffer.Gti.Part5.Error type actuator check during teach in shiftdrum 1
Data.Comment: error of actuator check during teach in shift drum 1

Data.Name: Buffer.Gti.Part5.Error type actuator check during teach in shiftdrum 2
Data.Comment: error of actuator check during teach in shift drum 2

Data.Name: Buffer.Gti.Part5.Error type actuator sensor check shiftdrum 1
Buffer.Gti.Part5.Error type actuator sensor check shiftdrum 2
Data.Comment: error type actuator sensor check shiftdrum 2

Data.Name: Buffer.Gti.Part8.Error state gearbox tech in
Data.Comment: start state of gearbox teach in

Data.Name: Buffer.Gti.Part8.Data in nonvolatile RAM is valid
Data.Comment: shows if data in non-volatile RAM is valid (comparison of mirrored data ok)

Data.Name: Buffer.Fom.Part2.Engine on indicator
Data.Comment: indicates that the engine is running

Data.Name: Buffer.Fom.Part3.Amplifier stage Shiftdrum motor 1 enabled
Data.Comment: amplifier stage of shiftdrum motor enabled

Data.Name: Buffer.Fom.Part4.Amplifier stage Shiftdrum motor 2 enabled
Data.Comment: amplifier stage of shiftdrum motor enabled

Data.Name: Buffer.Fom.Part7.Target gear sd1
Data.Comment: target gear checked by clutch and gearbox

Data.Name: Buffer.Fom.Part8.Current gearc calc sd2 states
Data.Comment: contains the current gear calculated out of the shiftdrum states

Data.Name: Buffer.Fom.Part8.Target gear sd2
Data.Comment: target gear checked by clutch and gearbox

Data.Name: Buffer.Fom.Part9.State of shiftdrum 1 logic
Data.Comment: state of the shiftdrum logic for SD1

Data.Name: Buffer.Fom.Part9.State of shiftdrum 2 logic
Data.Comment: state of the shiftdrum logic for SD2

Data.Name: Buffer.Psc1.Part6.Engine on indicator
Data.Comment: indicates that the engine is running

Data.Name: Buffer.Psc1.Part9.State of shiftdrum 1 logic
Data.Comment: state of the shiftdrum logic for SD1

Data.Name: Buffer.Psc2.Part6.Engine on indicator
Data.Comment: indicates that the engine is running

Data.Name: Buffer.Psc2.Part7.Shiftdrum motor 1 amplifier stage enabled
Data.Comment: amplifier stage of shiftdrum motor enabled

Data.Name: Buffer.Psc2.Part9.State of shiftdrum 2 logic
Data.Comment: state of the shiftdrum logic for SD2

Data.Name: Manual upshift signal from shift lever
Data.Comment: manual upshift signal from shift lever

Data.Name: Manual downshift signal from shift lever
Data.Comment: manual downshift signal from shift lever

Data.Name: encoder value of shiftdrum 1 during last shutdown
lower position of shiftdrum 1 determined by reference drive
encoder value of shiftdrum 2 during last shutdown
lower position of shiftdrum 2 determined by reference drive
last executed reference drive sd2 was faulty
last executed reference drive sd1 was faulty
refpoint drift of shifdrum 2 was detected during last run
input shaft 1 speed error status for error storage
input shaft 2 speed error status for error storage
kilometers driven at temperature above 0 C
hw_ff_buffer_15.Conti internal TRS voltage
Data.Comment: Conti internal scaled value of TRS voltage

Data.Name: hw_ff_buffer_16.Conti internal TRS voltage
Data.Comment: Conti internal scaled value of TRS voltage

Data.Name: hw_ff_buffer_16.PWM duty cycle of TRS1 sensor
Data.Comment: PWM duty cycle of TRS1 sensor

Data.Name: hw_ff_buffer_16.PWM duty cycle of TRS2 sensor
Data.Comment: PWM duty cycle of TRS2 sensor

Data.Name: hw_ff_buffer_13.AMS error 0
Data.Comment: Conti internal error status related to the ams

Data.Name: hw_ff_buffer_14.AMS error 1
Data.Comment: Conti internal error status related to the ams

Data.Name: refpoint drift of shifdrum 1 was detected during last run

Item.Text: ATIC shift actuator 1 OC on h-bridge or on 3rd half bridge_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 1 over or undervoltage
ATIC shift actuator 1 SCB on half bridge 1,2,3_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 1 SCG on half bridge 1,2,3_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 2 OC on h-bridge or on 3rd half bridge_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 2 over or undervoltage
ATIC shift actuator 2 SCB on half bridge 1,2,3_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 2 SCG on half bridge 1,2,3_ low side or high side
Clutch actuator 1 (CCS/dir from ATIC vs.redundant hall signals)
Clutch actuator 1 hall sensor power supply voltage over 5,8V
Clutch actuator 1 hall sensor power supply voltage under 3,72V
Clutch actuator 1 position signal correlation not plausible
Clutch actuator 2 (CCS/dir from ATIC vs.redundant hall signals)
Clutch actuator 2 hall sensor power supply voltage over 5,8V
Clutch actuator 2 hall sensor power supply voltage under 3,72V
Clutch actuator 2 position signal correlation not plausible
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 1 supply voltage over 13V
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 1 supply voltage under 4,5V
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 1 value not plausible
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 2 supply voltage over 13V
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 2 supply voltage under 4,5V
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 2 value not plausible
Shift actuator 1 angle difference too high
Shift actuator 1 position sensor signal incorrect ATIC vs. RPS
Shift actuator 1 RPS signal wrong PWM
Shift actuator 2 angle difference too high
Shift actuator 2 position sensor signal incorrect ATIC vs. RPS
Shift actuator 2 RPS signal wrong PWM
Shift drum 1 endstop position not plausible
Shift drum 1 moving direction not plausible
Shift drum 1 position out of range
Shift drum 1 sync speed rate not plausible
Shift drum 2 moving direction not plausible
Shift drum 2 position out of range
Shift drum 2 sync speed rate not plausible
TCU high power supply below first threshold
TCU high power supply over undervoltage
TCU low power supply below first threshold
TCU low power supply over undervoltage
MAM or gb mech part 1 or clu1 sync timeout
MAM or gb mech part 2 or clu2 sync timeout
MAM or gearbox mech part1 unexpected SD standstill/movement
MAM or gearbox mech part2 unexpected SD standstill/movement
Manual up down switches invalid voltage
Lvl2 restart SZ1 unwanted engine torque increase
Lvl2 restart SZ2 wrong dir launch
Lvl2 restart SZ3 shift r while driving
Lvl2 restart SZ6a downshift not allowed
Circuit Short To Ground Or Open
Circuit Short To Battery Or Open
Signal Rate Of Change Below Threshold
Signal Rate Of Change Above Threshold
Signal Bias Out Of Range / Zero Adjustment Failure
Signal Has Too Few Transitions / Events
Signal Has Too Many Transitions / Events
Alive / Sequence Counter Incorrect / Not Updated
Value Of Signal Protection Calculation Incorrect

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Clutch 1 error.clutch 1 close reference failed repeatedly

Data.Comment: self open test result active only repeatedly

Data.Name: Clutch 1 error.clutch 1 self open test result blocked repeatedly
Data.Comment: self open test result active only repeatedly

Data.Name: Clutch 2 error.clutch 2 open reference failed repeatedly
Clutch 2 error.clutch 2 close reference failed repeatedly

Data.Comment: self open test result active only repeatedly

Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

DataItem.Name: Brake and handbrake status.Brake and handbrake status

Device.Name: ATIC shift actuator 1 OC on h-bridge or on 3rd half bridge_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 1 over or undervoltage
ATIC shift actuator 1 SCB on half bridge 1,2,3_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 1 SCG on half bridge 1,2,3_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 2 OC on h-bridge or on 3rd half bridge_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 2 over or undervoltage
ATIC shift actuator 2 SCB on half bridge 1,2,3_ low side or high side
ATIC shift actuator 2 SCG on half bridge 1,2,3_ low side or high side
Clutch actuator 1 (CCS/dir from ATIC vs.redundant hall signals)
Clutch actuator 1 hall sensor power supply voltage over 5,8V
Clutch actuator 1 hall sensor power supply voltage under 3,72V
Clutch actuator 1 position signal correlation not plausible
Clutch actuator 2 (CCS/dir from ATIC vs.redundant hall signals)
Clutch actuator 2 hall sensor power supply voltage over 5,8V
Clutch actuator 2 hall sensor power supply voltage under 3,72V
Clutch actuator 2 position signal correlation not plausible
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 1 supply voltage over 13V
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 1 supply voltage under 4,5V
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 1 value not plausible
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 2 supply voltage over 13V
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 2 supply voltage under 4,5V
Inputshaft Speed Sensor 2 value not plausible
Shift actuator 1 angle difference too high
Shift actuator 1 position sensor signal incorrect ATIC vs. RPS
Shift actuator 1 RPS signal wrong PWM
Shift actuator 2 angle difference too high
Shift actuator 2 position sensor signal incorrect ATIC vs. RPS
Shift actuator 2 RPS signal wrong PWM
Shift drum 1 endstop position not plausible
Shift drum 1 moving direction not plausible
Shift drum 1 position out of range
Shift drum 1 sync speed rate not plausible
Shift drum 2 moving direction not plausible
Shift drum 2 position out of range
Shift drum 2 sync speed rate not plausible
TCU high power supply below first threshold
TCU high power supply over undervoltage
TCU low power supply below first threshold
TCU low power supply over undervoltage
MAM or gb mech part 1 or clu1 sync timeout
MAM or gb mech part 2 or clu2 sync timeout
MAM or gearbox mech part1 unexpected SD standstill/movement
MAM or gearbox mech part2 unexpected SD standstill/movement
Manual up down switches invalid voltage
Lvl2 restart SZ1 unwanted engine torque increase
Lvl2 restart SZ2 wrong dir launch
Lvl2 restart SZ3 shift r while driving
Lvl2 restart SZ6a downshift not allowed

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Status request TRS shift lever teach in
If the TRS teaching was never done before then the value pre-teaching will be: "0"

Button.Text: Perform TRS shift lever position teach in

Send.RequestName: Reference TRS in shiftlever position P.Perform routine

Display.RequestName: Reference TRS in shiftlever position P.Status

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Battery voltage >9V | Engine NOT running | Brake pedal PRESSED
Status request shift drum position teach in
Wait 10 seconds until the routine finishes execution

Button.Text: Perform shift drums position teach in

Screen.Name: Step 3. 1 BUTTON Reset all relevant clutch data

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.

Button.Text: Reset all relevant clutch data to default value

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.Clutch 1
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.Clutch 2
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.Clutch 1
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.Clutch 2

Screen.Name: Step 3. (Only if 1 BUTTON fails) Reset all relevant clutch data

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.

Button.Text: 1.1. Reset clutch friction shape coefficients clutch 1
1.2. Reset clutch friction shape coefficients clutch 2
2.1. Reset clutch 1 actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.Clutch 1

Button.Text: 2.2. Reset clutch 2 actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.Clutch 2

Button.Text: 3.1. Reset clutch 1 actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.Clutch 1

Button.Text: 3.2. Reset clutch 2 actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.Clutch 2

Button.Text: 6.1. Reset EOL completion status for clutch 1
6.2. Reset EOL completion status for clutch 2

Label.Text: Start routine necessary only for steps 4, 5 and 6
Status request clutch 1 position teach in
Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Status request clutch 2 position teach in
Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Screen.Name: Step 5. Engage N on both input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Status request Engage N on both input shafts

Button.Text: Engage N on both input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.

Screen.Name: Step 7.0. Prerequisites Clutch touch point adaptation

Label.Text: Gears must be engaged for both input shafts
Press the button below if gears are in neutral position
Shift lever in P | Battery voltage >9V | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
AC OFF | Engine should be warm.
Repeat the procedure with a powerlatch in case the confidence level is not High
Even if the clutch value is a little bit lower or higher (0.2 mm +/-), the clutch is still ok
If the clutch 1 value is between [5;15] mm, the clutch is ok
Shift lever in P | Battery voltage >9V | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Repeat the procedure with a powerlatch in case the confidence level is not High
AC OFF | Engine should be warm.
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.
If the clutch 2 value is between [6;16] mm, the clutch is ok
Even if the clutch value is a little bit lower or higher (0.2 mm +/-), the clutch is still ok

Screen.Name: Step 1. 1 BUTTON Reset all relevant clutch data

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then shift ignition ON again.

Button.Text: Reset all relevant clutch data to default value

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.Clutch 1
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction.Clutch 2
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.Clutch 1
Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.Clutch 2

Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then shift ignition ON again.

Button.Text: 1.1. Reset clutch friction shape coefficients clutch 1
1.2. Reset clutch friction shape coefficients clutch 2

Button.Text: 3.2. Reset clutch 2 actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction.Clutch 2

Button.Text: 7.1. Reset EOL completion status for clutch 1
7.2. Reset EOL completion status for clutch 2

Label.Text: Routine necessary only for steps 4, 5 and 6
Status request clutch 1 position teach in
Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Status request clutch 2 position teach in
Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Screen.Name: Step 3. Engage N on both input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Status request Engage N on both input shafts

Button.Text: Engage N on both input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Service NOT executed during current ignition cycle
Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then shift ignition ON again.
Engage N on both input shafts
Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Gearbox in NEUTRAL
Status request Engage N on both input shafts

Button.Text: Engage N on both input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Press the accelerator pedal until reaching 3500 RPM, start the routine and maintain 3500 RPM until routine finishes
Shift lever in P | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Press the accelerator pedal until reaching 3500 RPM, start the routine and maintain 3500 RPM until routine finishes
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.
Engage N on both input shafts
Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Gearbox in NEUTRAL
Status request Engage N on both input shafts

Button.Text: Engage N on both input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P Ignition ON Engine NOT running
Shift lever in P Ignition ON Engine NOT running
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.

Screen.Name: Step 8.0. Prerequisites Clutch touch point adaptation

Label.Text: Gears must be engaged for both input shafts
Press the button below if gears are in neutral position
Shift lever in P | Battery voltage >9V | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
AC OFF | Engine should be warm.
Repeat the procedure with a powerlatch in case the confidence level is not High
Even if the clutch value is a little bit lower or higher (0.2 mm +/-), the clutch is still ok
If the clutch 1 value is between [5;15] mm, the clutch is ok
Shift lever in P | Battery voltage >9V | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Repeat the procedure with a powerlatch in case the confidence level is not High
AC OFF | Engine should be warm.
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.
If the clutch 2 value is between [6;16] mm, the clutch is ok
Even if the clutch value is a little bit lower or higher (0.2 mm +/-), the clutch is still ok
Not active --> Speed is read from rear wheels
Active --> TCU will ignore rear wheels speed and will take into account ABS vehicle speed signal
TCU will ignore rear wheels speed and will take into account ABS vehicle speed signal
Speed will be read from rear wheels
Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
If the two checks above, give a positive result, TRS is OK
If only one of these fails, proceed to screen: "Reference TRS Shift Lever position"
TRS thresholds for MAMgen2 H79 K9Kgen6 EU6 ($2D0A):
Manually shift the lever in the positions P, R, N, D and check the values below:
TRS thresholds for all MAMgen2 applications except H79 K9Kgen6 EU6 ($2D0A):
If after TRS teaching values are not within thresholds, readjust TRS cable
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.

Send.RequestName: Reference TRS in shiftlever position P.Perform routine

Display.RequestName: Reference TRS in shiftlever position P.Status

Label.Text: Routine necessary only for the following steps

Screen.Name: Step 2. Engage N on both input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Status request Engage N on both input shafts

Button.Text: Engage N on both input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)
Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Screen.Name: Step 5. Prerequisites Clutch actuator position cycle control test

Label.Text: Prerequisites Clutch actuator position cycle control test
Gears must be engaged for both input shafts
Press the button below if gears are in neutral position

Screen.Name: Step 6. Clutch 1 actuator position cycle control test

Label.Text: Status request clutch 1 actuator position cycle control test
Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Perform clutch 1 actuator position cycle control test

Send.RequestName: Clutch actuator position cycle control.Perform routine.Clutch 1

Screen.Name: Step 7. Clutch 2 actuator position cycle control test

Label.Text: Status request clutch 2 actuator position cycle control test
Shift lever in P | Ignition switched ON | Engine NOT running (0rpm)

Button.Text: Perform clutch 2 actuator position cycle control test

Send.RequestName: Clutch actuator position cycle control.Perform routine.Clutch 2

Label.Text: Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.
THIS PROCEDURE IS TO BE USED ONLY IN CASE OF BAD TOUCH POINT ADAPTATION TEACH-IN
If the clutch 1 value is between [5;15] mm, the clutch is ok
Even if the clutch value is a little bit lower or higher (0.2 mm +/-), the clutch is still ok
If the clutch 2 value is between [6;16] mm, the clutch is ok
Even if the clutch value is a little bit lower or higher (0.2 mm +/-), the clutch is still ok
If the two checks above, give a positive result, TRS is OK
If only one of these fails, proceed to screen: "Reference TRS Shift Lever position"
TRS thresholds for MAMgen2 H79 K9Kgen6 EU6 ($2D0A):
Manually shift the lever in the positions P, R, N, D and check the values below:
TRS thresholds for all MAMgen2 applications except H79 K9Kgen6 EU6 ($2D0A):
If after TRS teaching values are not within thresholds, readjust TRS cable
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.

Send.RequestName: Reference TRS in shiftlever position P.Perform routine

Display.RequestName: Reference TRS in shiftlever position P.Status

Screen.Name: Manual procedure for ISS1 and ISS2 checking

Label.Text: Shift lever | Ignition ON | Engine running | Gear 1 pre-engaged | R pre-engaged
Move lever in R position and drive backward
Check ISS2 speed while vehicle is moving
If ISS1 speed value is positive and varies while driving, ISS1 is OK
Move lever in D position and drive forward
Check ISS1 speed while vehicle is moving
If ISS2 speed value varies while driving, ISS2 is OK
Shift lever Ignition ON Engine running R gear pre-engaged
Move lever in R position and drive backward
Check ISS1 speed while vehicle is moving
If ISS1 speed is negative, ISS1 direction detection is OK

Category.Name: In case DTCs 1862 and 1863 are present

Label.Text: Routine necessary only for steps 4, 5 and 6
Engage N on both input shafts
Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Gearbox in NEUTRAL
Status request Engage N on both input shafts

Button.Text: Engage N on both input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Press the accelerator pedal until reaching 3500 RPM, start the routine and maintain 3500 RPM until routine finishes
Shift lever in P | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Press the accelerator pedal until reaching 3500 RPM, start the routine and maintain 3500 RPM until routine finishes
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.

Screen.Name: Step 4.0. Prerequisites Clutch Torque Capacity Recovery process

Label.Text: Engage N on both input shafts
Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Gearbox in NEUTRAL
Status request Engage N on both input shafts

Button.Text: Engage N on both input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Battery voltage >9V | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Status request clutch torque capacity recovery
AC OFF | Engine should be warm.
Procedure must be done 4 times, each time ending with ok status
Shift lever in P | Battery voltage >9V | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
AC OFF | Engine should be warm.
Procedure must be done 4 times, each time ending with ok status
Status request clutch torque capacity recovery
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.
Routine necessary only for steps 4, 5 and 6
Engage N on both input shafts
Ignition ON | Engine NOT running | Gearbox in NEUTRAL
Status request Engage N on both input shafts

Button.Text: Engage N on both input shafts

Label.Text: Shift lever in P | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Press the accelerator pedal until reaching 3500 RPM, start the routine and maintain 3500 RPM until routine finishes
Shift lever in P | Engine RUNNING | Brake pedal PRESSED
Press the accelerator pedal until reaching 3500 RPM, start the routine and maintain 3500 RPM until routine finishes
Swithch ignition off, wait for 10 seconds and then switch ignition ON again.
